title: Free Beauty Sample Box
description: Get a curated box of premium beauty samples delivered to your door. Includes skincare, makeup, and fragrance samples from top brands.
eligibility: Open to residents aged 18+. Available in select European countries. One per household.
howItWorks: Click the claim button to visit the brand's page
Fill out the short registration form
Receive your sample box within 3-4 weeks

seo.title: Free Beauty Sample Box | Premium Samples Delivered | TryTreat
seo.description: Get a free beauty sample box worth €25+. Includes skincare, makeup and fragrance samples. No purchase required. Claim yours today.

faq.question: What's included in the sample box?
faq.answer: The box includes 5-7 premium beauty samples including skincare, makeup, and fragrance products from well-known brands.

faq.question: Is there any cost involved?
faq.answer: The sample box is completely free. There are no hidden costs or subscription requirements.

faq.question: How long does delivery take?
faq.answer: Delivery typically takes 3-4 weeks depending on your location.

title: Exclusive 20% Off First Order
description: Save 20% on your first order at Example Store. Use this exclusive coupon code at checkout.
eligibility: Valid for new customers only. One use per account. Minimum order value may apply.
howItWorks: Copy the coupon code from this page
Shop at Example Store and add items to your cart

seo.title: 20% Off First Order | Exclusive Coupon Code | TryTreat
seo.description: Get 20% off your first order with this exclusive coupon code. Valid on all products. Limited time offer.

faq.question: Does this work on sale items?
faq.answer: The coupon code can typically be combined with sale items, but check the store's terms for any exclusions.
